content.en:
"Get out!"

Ye Tian directly made a brazen attack, and the endless golden light directly knocked a sixfold primordial ancestor into the air, and even the Dao ancestor in the later stage of the sixfold primordial ancestor was blown away by a blow, and his body was cracked.

Of course, Ye Tian did not kill him.

After all, this is the boundary of the Tongtian Origin Domain, if he kills a sixfold primordial ancestor, he won't even think about leaving, maybe that half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor will make a move.

So, just show what you're good at.

These Dao Ancestors were injured one by one, and their faces were afraid.

They could see that Ye Tian's subordinates were merciful, otherwise they would not have been injured.

"What you have used is the Supreme Natal Primordial Control Technique, and you have comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths!!!

A Dao Ancestor in the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor was terrified.

After all, this Dao Ancestor's cultivation was higher than Ye Tian's, so he could see a little mystery of the Endless Golden Light, and only then did he discover that this Endless Golden Light actually contained three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extreme Dao.

Ye Tian didn't answer, but continued: "Do you still want to do it, I just sent my apprentice into the Golden Light Domain, and I don't want to be your enemy!"

Many Dao Ancestors had gloomy faces, but they didn't dare to continue to move.

With Ye Tian's cultivation and comprehension of three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, if he really made a full attack, it would be enough to kill them in an instant.

In the entire Tongtian Origin Domain, there is only one person who can really deal with Ye Tian, and that is the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, Xuanqing Dao Ancestor!

Although the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor was not the strongest in the Tongtian Origin Domain Realm, he was now the only half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor who was stranded in the Tongtian Origin Domain Realm, comprehending the Sevenfold Yuan Dao, and his strength far surpassed that of the Sixfold Peak Ancestor.

If Xuanqing Dao Ancestor made a move, he would definitely be able to kill Ye Tian.

However, they don't move Xuanqing Dao Ancestor!

So, they stopped making a move and acquiesced in Ye Tian's behavior.

......

"Sure enough!"

Han Xuan glanced at Ye Tian and said secretly in her heart.

She had always guessed that Shizun had comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and had also condensed the ninefold Dao fruits, and now it seemed that this was really the case, otherwise the strength would not be so terrifying!

Now, even the Dao Ancestor of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor in the later stage said so, it must be 100% comprehending the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths.

This time it's a real hammer!

"Let's go inside!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Master!"

Han Xuan immediately escaped into the Golden Light Domain.

And Ye Tian was waiting silently here, cultivating by the way.

The other Dao Ancestors were waiting far away, not daring to stay with Ye Tian.

Golden Light Domain.

After Han Xuan entered here, she showed her invincible strength, after all, she was a reincarnation, she was a Dao Ancestor in her previous life, and now even if she is a Triple Dao Ancestor, she has also mastered more than three hundred extreme extreme paths, and has also created a large number of perfection-level primordial control techniques, and it is also the top-level perfection-level primordial control technique.

Even those Holy Sons who had comprehended the one hundred and eight extreme extremes, when they met her, they were killed in seconds.

So, Han Xuan killed all sides in the Golden Light Domain, if she found the Golden Light and took it directly, whoever dared to snatch it from her would be killed by her directly.

Airplanes!

One golden light after another was absorbed by Han Xuan, and while she comprehended the extreme path, she searched for a new golden light.

After absorbing this special golden light, her comprehension ability increased more than 10,000 times, so she had a great hope of comprehending one or two extreme extremes again.

That is, of course, if she gets enough golden light.

Time passed slowly, Han Xuan kept snatching the golden light, and as for other resources, she didn't care at all.

After all, in the Golden Light Domain, except for this special golden light, the other resources were relatively ordinary, perhaps very precious to the other Triple Ancestors, but they were not looked at by Han Xuan.

After a long time, the Golden Light Domain began to close.

The Triple Ancestor was moved out by the Great Array, and all the Triple Ancestors were not allowed to stay in the Golden Light Domain.

......

"Master!"

Han Xuan came out and immediately came to Ye Tian's side.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian left with Han Xuan, and no one stopped him.

After returning to the dojo, Han Xuan immediately went to retreat again, after all, she had absorbed a lot of golden light, and now the effect was still there, so she naturally had to take the opportunity to continue to comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao, and she couldn't waste this opportunity.

After a period of time, Han Xuan completely used up the effect brought by the golden light.

"I have comprehended two more extreme extreme paths, and I have already comprehended three hundred and sixty-three extreme extreme paths, and only the last two extreme extreme paths remain. No, it should be said that I only need to comprehend the last extreme path, and my own extreme path will also step into the extreme level. "

Han Xuan said secretly.

But she knew very well that the three hundred and sixty-four Extreme Extreme Paths were very difficult to comprehend, and it was still several times more difficult to comprehend than the two Extreme Extreme Paths she had comprehended before.

And the next time the Golden Light Domain will open will be after the 10 million Origin Domain Era, so she has to wait for 10 million Origin Domain Era before she can continue to enter the Golden Light Domain.

The point is, those golden lights don't necessarily work for her anymore.

Therefore, she couldn't expect those golden rays in the Golden Light Domain, and it was best to find other ways to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-fourth Extreme Extreme Dao.

"Let's take it slowly, there's no other way!"

Han Xuan said secretly.

......

Now.

Ye Tian was still cultivating, but his cultivation was not trying to break through to the late stage realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor in a short period of time, not only because of the lack of resources, but also because it was more than ten times more difficult to become the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor than in the middle stage of becoming a Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not in a hurry to break through for the time being, he was ready to spend a lot of time comprehending the Yuan Dao.

Comprehending the Yuan Dao does not necessarily have to wait for the cultivation to break through to the peak realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, but it is too difficult to comprehend the Yuan Dao, and other Dao Ancestors will not be stupid to waste time to comprehend the Yuan Dao, so they will naturally take the lead in improving their cultivation, and wait until their cultivation is promoted to the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and their cultivation cannot be improved, and then they will comprehend the Yuan Dao!

Moreover, those Dao Ancestors couldn't even cultivate at the peak of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, let alone comprehend the Yuan Dao.

If the difficulty of cultivating to the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor is compared to one, then the difficulty of comprehending the Yuan Dao is one hundred, and the difficulty is too great, who will begin to comprehend the Yuan Dao in the middle of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor!

Of course, even if you comprehend the Yuan Dao, if you want to become a half-step sevenfold ancestor, you still need the Yuan Dao Quenching Technique, and use the Yuan Dao to break your own shackles.

And Ye Tian currently does not have the Yuan Dao Quenching Technique, and when he has the opportunity to obtain such a secret technique from other forces, he really can't obtain it, so it's a big deal to ask the apprentice Han Xuan if he has it.

However, for now, let's comprehend the Yuan Dao first!
